Can you create an itinerary for my sister's bachelorette party? The theme is "Cowgirls & Cocktails" so please incorporate that into the activities if possible. I will arrive at the air bnb at 3pm on Friday to set up and we have to check out at 10am on Sunday. Please include a dinner out, karaoke and at least 2 bridal games. Lastly, the air bnb has a pool so please allot time for swimming.

Here's a suggested itinerary for your sister's "Cowgirls & Cocktails" bachelorette party:

Friday, 3:00 pm - Arrival and Setup

* Arrive at the Airbnb and set up the space with a cowgirl-themed backdrop, balloons, and decorations.
* Prepare a welcome drink, such as a "Cowgirl Collins" (a sparkling cocktail made with gin, lemon juice, and a splash of soda water), for the guests to enjoy upon arrival.
* Get the pool area ready for later use.

Friday, 5:00 pm - Guest Arrival and Pool Time

* Guests arrive and are greeted with their welcome drink.
* Spend some time lounging by the pool, taking photos, and getting settled.
* Have a few cowgirl-themed pool floats, such as inflatable horses or cowboy hats, to add to the fun.

Friday, 7:30 pm - Dinner Out

* Head to a local restaurant that serves Western-inspired cuisine, such as a steakhouse or a BBQ joint.
* Make sure to reserve a table in advance to ensure availability.

Friday, 9:30 pm - Karaoke Night

* After dinner, head to a local karaoke bar or rent a machine to set up at the Airbnb.
* Sing country classics, such as Dolly Parton or Garth Brooks, to keep with the cowgirl theme.
* Have a few fun props, such as cowboy hats and boots, to add to the performance.

Saturday, 10:00 am - Bridal Game 1: "Pin the Tiara on the Bride"

* Start the day with a fun twist on the classic game.
* Create a large poster of a cowgirl bride and have each guest take turns trying to pin a tiara on her head.
* The guest who gets their tiara closest to the correct spot wins!

Saturday, 11:30 am - Pool Time and Lunch

* Spend some time lounging by the pool and enjoying a casual lunch, such as sandwiches or salads.
* Have a few fun pool games, such as a giant inflatable horse or a pool volleyball set, to keep things lively.

Saturday, 2:30 pm - Bridal Game 2: "Cowgirl Trivia"

* Test the guests' knowledge of the bride-to-be with a trivia game.
* Create questions about the bride's interests, favorite movies, and more.
* The guest who answers the most questions correctly wins!

Saturday, 5:00 pm - Cocktail Hour

* Set up a DIY cocktail bar with a variety of mixers, juices, and garnishes.
* Have a few signature cocktails, such as a "Cowgirl Mule" (a twist on the classic Moscow Mule), for guests to enjoy.
* Take some time to relax and enjoy each other's company.

Saturday, 7:30 pm - Dinner In

* Have a catered dinner or cook a meal at the Airbnb.
* Keep things simple with a BBQ or a taco bar.
* Have some fun cowgirl-themed desserts, such as horse-shaped cookies or cowboy hat cake pops.

Saturday, 9:30 pm - Movie Night

* Set up a projector or big screen to watch a classic Western film, such as "Thelma and Louise" or "Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid".
* Have some cozy blankets and pillows to make it a comfortable movie night.

Sunday, 9:00 am - Breakfast and Check-Out

* Have a casual breakfast, such as pancakes or waffles, at the Airbnb.
* Take some time to pack up and say goodbye to the guests.
* Check out of the Airbnb by 10:00 am.

I hope this itinerary helps make your sister's bachelorette party a memorable and fun celebration!
